mapper.sql: DIAGNOSIS_CODE, DIAGNOSIS_NAME, CODE_VERSION, STD_INDICATOR, APPROVED_INDICATOR, CREATE_DATE, INPUT_CODE
mapper.insert: insert into DIAGNOSIS_DICT (DIAGNOSIS_CODE, DIAGNOSIS_NAME, CODE_VERSION, STD_INDICATOR, APPROVED_INDICATOR, CREATE_DATE, INPUT_CODE) values (#{diagnosisCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{diagnosisName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{codeVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stdIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{approvedIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{createDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{inputCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into DIAGNOSIS_DICT
DIAGNOSIS_CODE,
DIAGNOSIS_NAME,
CODE_VERSION,
STD_INDICATOR,
APPROVED_INDICATOR,
CREATE_DATE,
INPUT_CODE,
#{diagnosisCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{diagnosisName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{codeVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{stdIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{approvedIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{createDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{inputCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
